summary: Iteration 22 - Bug fixes and feature verification complete. Fixed SMS modal CSS issue (missing --surface variable). All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

bug_1_sms_modal_readability.description: SMS modal was transparent in light mode due to missing --surface CSS variable
bug_1_sms_modal_readability.fix_applied: Added --surface, --surface-2, --text, --muted, --muted-dark, --accent, --success CSS variables to themes.css for both light and dark themes
bug_1_sms_modal_readability.light_mode: White background (#FFFFFF) with dark text (#0E0B1E) - now readable
bug_1_sms_modal_readability.dark_mode: Dark background (#2E2E42) with white text (#FFFFFF) - readable

bug_2_landing_page_pro_plus_language.description: PRO+ features now use clear language instead of technical terms

features_text.hot_leads: Hot leads auto-identified (FR: Prospects chauds identifiés auto)
features_text.commission: Commission tracking (FR: Suivi de vos commissions)
features_text.weekly_report: Weekly email report (FR: Rapport hebdo par email)

bug_3_profile_plan_display.description: Profile correctly shows PRO+ for test@test.com user

feature_4_budget_slider_project_type.description: BudgetSlider correctly adapts to project type

seller.label: Desired sale price (incl. fees) / Prix de vente souhaité TTC

feature_5_ai_suggestions_dropdown.description: AI suggestions block shows with individual Add buttons for each suggestion
feature_5_ai_suggestions_dropdown.note: Show more button appears when >1 suggestion, expands to show all with individual Add buttons

backend_pricing_starter.description: /api/plans/pricing returns STARTER not FREE for free tier

css_fix_applied.issue: Missing CSS variables that App.css depends on (--surface, --surface-2, --text, --muted, --accent, --success)
css_fix_applied.fix: Added compatibility variables to both .theme-light and .theme-dark sections

backend_api_tests: ✓ EUR pricing correct (PRO: 999 cents, PRO+: 2499 cents)
✓ PRO+ features enabled (budget_slider, sms_one_click, heat_score, roi_dashboard, etc.)
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ SMS modal readable in light mode (white bg: rgb(255, 255, 255), dark text: rgb(14, 11, 30))
✓ Landing page PRO+ uses clear language
✓ BudgetSlider adapts to buyer/seller/renter project types
✓ AI suggestions block visible with Add buttons

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bugs from iteration 22 have been fixed and verified. The main fix was adding missing CSS variables (--surface, --surface-2, --text, --muted, --accent, --success) to themes.css which were required by App.css but not defined. This caused the SMS modal to have a transparent background. The BudgetSlider component correctly adapts its scale and behavior based on projectType (buyer/seller/renter). PRO+ features use clear language on landing page. Profile correctly shows PRO+ for test@test.com.
